infringements.steward_decision_summary: 2026 MONACO GRAND PRIX 07 - 09 June 2026 The driver and team representative are required to report to the Stewards at 18:00, in relation to the incident below: The Stewards From The Stewards To The Team Manager, Cadillac Formula 1 Team Document 76 Date 07 June 2026 Time 17:22 No / Driver 11 - Sergio

raw_text_excerpt:
2026 MONACO GRAND PRIX
07 - 09 June 2026
The driver and team representative are required to report to the Stewards at 18:00, in relation to the
incident below: 
 
The Stewards
From The Stewards
To The Team Manager,
Cadillac Formula 1 Team
Document 76
Date 07 June 2026
Time 17:22
No / Driver 11 - Sergio Perez
Reason Alleged breach of Article 12.2.1.i of the International Sporting Code - non-compliance
with Race Director’s Event Note (item 13.6, document 48) – Practice start
infringement.
Garry Connelly Tanja Geilhausen
Derek Warwick Jean-François Calmes
